title: Jati Tinggi
description: jatitinggi.com zoominfo.com/c/jati-tinggi-holding-sdn-bhd/399353498 Jati Tinggi Group Berhad, founded in 2003 and headquartered in Cheras, Selangor, Malaysia, is a publicly listed infrastructure utilities engineering company (KLSE: JTGROUP). The company specialises in underground and overhead utilities for electricity transmission & distribution, fiber optic networks, drainage, sewerage pipelines, substation EPCC services, and street lighting. It operates as a subsidiary of Broad River Capital Sdn Bhd, employs 51–200 people, and recently won an RM80 million contract from TNB (Tenaga Nasional Berhad)
